summary: Full testing of 3 new features: (1) Signal due date editing with CalendarPicker, (2) Backend date normalization, (3) Dashboard heatmap. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: calendar picker opens, date selection works, smart default button present, signals created successfully, dashboard Activity heatmap visible with month grid.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow'
Unexpected text node warnings - minor but should be cleaned up

seed_data_creation: Created test signals during testing, cleaned up via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) CalendarPicker component works on Today screen signal modal - shows month grid, day selection, Smart Default button, prev/next month navigation. (2) Backend normalize_date_to_iso() converts MM/DD/YY to YYYY-MM-DD and strips time from ISO datetime. (3) Dashboard Activity heatmap renders with month labels and color-coded grid. Signal CRUD with due_date fully working.
